title: Star Wars (2015) 61
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 61}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 61}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:StarWars2015-61.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 61 |writer=[[Kieron Gillen]] |penciller=[[Andrea Broccardo]] |inker=Andrea Broccardo |letterer=[[Clayton Cowles]] |colorist=[[Guru-eFX]] |cover artist=[[Jamal Campbell]] |editor=[[Mark Paniccia]] |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[February 6]], [[2019]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/71187/star_wars_2015_61|text=Star Wars (2015) #61}} |pages=23 |upc=759606081134 |timeline=c. [[2 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars (2015) 60|''Star Wars'' (2015) 60]] and [[Star Wars (2015) 62|''Star Wars'' (2015) 62]] to around [[2 ABY]]. As the events of ''Star Wars'' (2015) 61 take place between the two issues, they must also take place around 2 [['ABY-BBY' dating system|ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=61 }} '''''Star Wars'' 61''' is the sixty-first issue of the [[canon]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Kieron Gillen]], illustrated by [[Andrea Broccardo]], and published on [[February 6]], [[2019]] by [[Marvel Comics]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''"THE ESCAPE" AFTERMATH The great love story of our time as man and spaceship are brought back together in a tearful reunion. Er…HAN gets the ''FALCON'' back. It's not just about the escape—it's what you leave behind…'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=THE ESCAPE
Part VI |text=Queen Trios' betrayal has left the heroic Rebel Alliance scattered and at the mercy of the evil Galactic Empire! While stranded on the isolationist moon of Hubin, Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia Organa and Han Solo proved themselves to the leader of the colony, the former mercenary Thane Markona, and the warriors of his clan have joined the fight against the Empire. But the Thane fell to blasters of the elite stormtroopers of SCAR Squadron. And the rebels only narrowly escaped thanks to the help of Markona's daughter, Tula. The future of the Rebellion still hangs by a thread....}} ==Plot summary== ===Raiding Novka=== [[Prince]]ss [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]], [[Han Solo]], and [[Luke Skywalker]] travel with [[Clan Markona]] on [[Task Force 99|Scar Squadron's]] stolen [[Sentinel-class landing craft|Imperial landing craft]] to the [[Imperial Impound Yard]] on [[Novka]]. Unable to produce the right clearance code, the rebels ream their shuttle into the clearance tower, knocking it out of action. With one wing damaged, the rebels and Clan Markona and their shuttle in the impound yard, eliminating the [[stormtrooper]] sentries in a brief gun battle. Sana Starros recovers her impounded ship ''[[Volt Cobra]]'' while Clan Markona boards a stolen [[Unidentified YT-2400 light freighter (Clan Markona)|YT-2400 light freighter]]. ===Onward to Brentaal IV=== On [[Brentaal IV]], [[C-3PO]], Han, Leia, Luke, and [[R2-D2]] meet with the [[Herglic]] information broker [[Qensog]], who speaks a rare dialect of [[Huttese]]. C-3PO speaks with Qensong who initially reacts with anger but C-3PO is able to calm him down and look him straight. Qensong gives the coordinates to the [[Rebel Alliance Navy|Alliance Fleet]] to C-3PO. Skywalker, who doesn't understand Huttese, initially thought that Qensog was being difficult. However, C-3PO clarifies that the Herglic was entirely helpful on that matter but disagreed over whether he should supply them with replacement leg plates. C-3PO says that he had to insist as a [[LOM-series protocol droid]] returns with several silver leg plates. Later, Skywalker tells Tula that her and his group are heading to meet with [[Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar|Ackbar]] and ''[[Home One]]''. He provides the Markonas with the coordinates of [[General]] [[Hera Syndulla]]'s ship [[Geist (cruiser)|''Geist'']]. Skywalker invites the Markona Clan to come with them to Ackbar but Tula is still upset that Skywalker and his friends indirectly caused the deaths of her father [[Markona]]. While realizing that Skywalker is not to blame for her father's death, she cannot look at Skywalker without being reminded by the loss of her father. Before leaving, she tells Skywalker that she is glad that they kissed but that it is their last kiss without regret. Sensing that Skywalker is hurt by the break-up, Solo reassures him that it could have been much worse. Skywalker says that it could have been but expresses relief that Tula is not like [[Chelli Lona Aphra|Dr Aphra]]. Starros is surprised that Luke had feelings for Aphra, remarking that Skywalker is lucky that guys and Aphra do not mix. She quips that Skywalker survived one Death Star and should not wish for another. ===Homecoming=== Traveling on the ''Volt Cobra'' to the [[Kaliida Nebula]], the rebels initially see no sign of the ''Home One''. Skywalker fears that they have stumbled into a trap while Han wonders if C-3PO picked a fight with the Herglic. Leia tells Han to calm down as he broadcasts the transponder code to the ''Home One''. After a brief delay, they hear Admiral Ackbar's voice on the [[comlink]] as ''Home One'' exits the nebula. Ackbar is relieved to learn that Leia and her friends have survived the [[Battle of Mako-Ta|assault]] on the [[Mako-Ta Space Docks]]. Leia is relieved that they have found the rebel fleet. The ''Volt Cobra'' lands inside the ''Home One''{{'s}} hangar where Han is greeted by [[Chewbacca]]. Chewbacca reveals that he and the engineer [[Meorti]] have been repairing the ''[[Millennium Falcon]]'' following the events at Mako-Ta. Han is initially annoyed that Chewbacca allowed a stranger to repair his ship but warms up to Chewie, telling him that he missed him while fingering [[Han Solo's dice|his chance cube]]. Meanwhile, Admiral Ackbar is delighted that Princess Leia survived in the face of their recent setbacks. Leia tells Ackbar that she has acquired several technical documents that will allow them to destroy [[Shu-Torun]]. Ackbar is uncomfortable with the idea of Leia diverting rebel forces to pursue a personal vendetta against [[Queen]] [[Trios]]. Leia explains that this is a small-scale sabotage mission and that taking out the planet will deal a blow to the Imperial ecnomy. When Ackbar asks how she is going to carry out this plan, Leia responds "with a plan they're never going to expect." ===Imperials on Hubin=== Back at the late [[Thane Markona's Estate]] on [[Hubin]], [[Sergeant]] [[Kreel]] asks his men if the perimeter is secure. [[Misty]] reports that they have managed to keep the [[thanrax]]es at bay, shooting a lone thanrax taking its chance. [[Zuke]] jokes about riding out to teach the creatures a lesson. Kreel asks [[Aero]] if he has made progress in manufacturing a [[transmitter]]. Aero replies that most of the parts are fakes and thinks that someone is playing games with them. Kreel thinks that the butler droid [[MK-1]] is too friendly. "[[Mic]]" informs Kreel that he [[Slicer|sliced]] into their computers and discovered that the rebels are planning to attack Shu-Torun. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars
